headline: Conflict in Iran Is Good for Chemical Stocks. 4 Upgrades to Buy.
summary: Wells Fargo upgraded shares of Celenase, Air Products, and Nutrien on Thursday. JPMorgan upgraded shares of Linde on Friday.

headline: APD to Showcase Freshline IQ Freezer at Seafood Expo North America
summary: APD will showcase its Freshline IQ Freezer and cryogenic food-freezing solutions at Seafood Expo North America, highlighting modular design, remote monitoring and efficiency gains.

headline: Correction: Wells Fargo Upgrades Air Products to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $325
summary: Correction:  Wells Fargo analyst Michael Sison upgrades Air Products (NYSE:APD) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $270 to $325.

raw.headline: Correction: Wells Fargo Upgrades Air Products to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $325
raw.summary: Correction:  Wells Fargo analyst Michael Sison upgrades Air Products (NYSE:APD) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $270 to $325.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Air Products, Raises Price Target to $325
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Michael Sison   maintains Air Products (NYSE:APD) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $270 to $325.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Air Products, Raises Price Target to $325
